runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.60) in a OPEN, finishing a 7 length eighth. Box stats strong with two wins and three placings from five starts. Has ability and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Jumped well at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at this track last start over 510m from this same draw. Should prove hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Was out of the money last start at Q Lakeside over 457m which ended a winning run. Others read better.

runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 450m at Grafton. Likely to find this too tough.

runners.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (30.06) over 520m at Q Parklands. Cannot be ruled out.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 498m at Townsville in a handy (28.54), beating Canya Hellfire. Will find this a bit tougher, predicted to struggle on this occasion.

runners.formComment: Effortless winner leading throughout to post a big 7 lengths victory in a Mix 5 last start at Q Parklands, clocking an outstanding 29.66 for the 520m trip. In winning form and can measure up again.
